message.content: @startuml title Fabric Private Chaincode - Enclave registry - Current approach hide footbox skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { ArrowColor #000000 LifeLineBorderColor #999999 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ParticipantBorderColor #666666 ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2 ActorBorderColor #666666 ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F2 BoxBorderColor #000000 BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC NoteBorderColor #666666 } actor Admin participant ECC participant ERCC actor IAS participant Orderer participant Peers note right of Peers Drawbacks - Single-endorser policy only + Custom validation at every peer - ERCC must contact IAS (Internet connection and IAS credentials needed) - Current impl: No way to securely pass credentials to ERCC only - for EPID attestation SPID is needed when quote is created (ECC must provide this) end note == instantiation == group instantiation Admin -> ECC : install Admin -> ECC : instantiate (expected_mrenclave) ECC -> ECC : putState(ecc.MRENCLAVE, expected_mrenclave) ECC --> Admin : success / error end group Admin -> Orderer : submit instantiate transaction note over Admin,Orderer : when next block ready Orderer -> Peers : broadcast block Peers -> Peers : Validation == register new enclave == group register new enclave Admin -> ECC : setup ECC -> "ECC_Enclave" #lightgreen : create ECC -> "ECC_Enclave" #lightgreen : getQuote(SPID) "ECC_Enclave" #lightgreen --> ECC : quote, ECC_s_pk ECC -> ERCC : register(quote, ECC_s_pk) ERCC -> IAS : send quote IAS --> ERCC : Attestation ERCC -> ERCC : putState(ercc.ECC_s_pk, Attestation) ERCC --> ECC : success / error ECC --> Admin : success / error end group Admin -> Orderer : submit setup transaction note over Admin,Orderer : when next block ready == register validation == group register validation Orderer -> Peers : broadcast block Peers -> Peers : Normal validation Peers -> "ERCC_VSCC" : Custom ERCC validation "ERCC_VSCC" -> "ERCC_VSCC" : expected_mrenclave = getState(ecc.MRENCLAVE) "ERCC_VSCC" -> "ERCC_VSCC" : check attestation signature "ERCC_VSCC" -> "ERCC_VSCC" : check attestation ECC_s_pk and mrenclave end group @enduml
